content.json:
## SQL Servers, Databases & Arc Benefits
SQL Server instances registered via Azure Arc, database inventory, and Arc capability tracking.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend version = tostring(properties.version)
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| extend containerId = tolower(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
| extend patchLevel = tostring(properties.patchLevel)
| extend productId = tostring(properties.productId)
| extend vCores = tostring(properties.vCores)
| extend instanceName = name
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
    | extend machineId = tolower(id)
    | extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
    | extend hostType = iff(tostring(properties.detectedProperties.model) contains 'Virtual', 'Virtual Machine', 'Physical Machine')
    | project machineId, machineName = name, osSku, hostType
) on $left.containerId == $right.machineId
| join kind=leftouter (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| extend licenseType = tostring(properties.licenseType)
| extend currentVersion = tostring(properties.currentVersion)
| project instanceName, subscriptionName, resourceGroup, machineName, version, edition, patchLevel, vCores, licenseType, currentVersion, osSku, hostType, location
| order by instanceName asc
content.title: SQL Server Instances

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend version = tostring(properties.version)
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| summarize Count = count() by version, edition
| order by version asc, edition asc
content.title: SQL Instances by Version & Edition

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances/databases'
| extend compatibilityLevel = tostring(properties.compatibilityLevel)
| summarize Databases = count() by compatibilityLevel
content.title: Databases by Compatibility Level

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances/databases'
| extend recoveryMode = tostring(properties.recoveryMode)
| summarize Databases = count() by recoveryMode
content.title: Databases by Recovery Model

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances/databases'
| extend lastFullBackup = iff(isnull(properties.backupInformation.lastFullBackup), 'False', 'True')
| summarize Databases = count() by lastFullBackup
content.title: Databases by Full Backup Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances/databases'
| extend compatibilityLevel = tostring(properties.compatibilityLevel)
| extend lastFullBackup = properties.backupInformation.lastFullBackup
| extend lastLogBackup = properties.backupInformation.lastLogBackup
| extend Instance = split(id, '/databases')[0]
| project Instance, Database = name, lastFullBackup = format_datetime(todatetime(lastFullBackup), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), lastLogBackup = format_datetime(todatetime(lastLogBackup), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), compatibilityLevel, recoveryMode = tostring(properties.recoveryMode)
content.title: Database Backup State Detail

content.json:
### Defender for SQL
SQL Server instances with Microsoft Defender for SQL enabled via security assessments.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend instanceId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    securityresources
    | where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments'
    | where properties.resourceDetails.Source == 'Azure'
    | extend resourceId = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceDetails.Id))
    | where resourceId contains 'sqlserverinstances'
    | distinct resourceId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.instanceId == $right.resourceId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Protected', 'Not Protected')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Defender for SQL Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend instanceId = tolower(id)
| extend version = tostring(properties.version)
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| join kind=leftouter (
    securityresources
    | where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments'
    | where properties.resourceDetails.Source == 'Azure'
    | extend resourceId = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceDetails.Id))
    | where resourceId contains 'sqlserverinstances'
    | distinct resourceId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.instanceId == $right.resourceId
| extend DefenderStatus = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Protected', 'Not Protected')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, version, edition, DefenderStatus
| order by DefenderStatus desc, Name asc
content.title: SQL Instance Details

content.json:
### Best Practices Assessment
SQL instances with BPA configured for proactive configuration health checks.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend bpaEnabled = tostring(properties.migration.assessment.enabled)
| extend Status = iff(bpaEnabled == 'true', 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: BPA Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend bpaEnabled = tostring(properties.migration.assessment.enabled)
| extend BPA = iff(bpaEnabled == 'true', 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, version = tostring(properties.version), edition = tostring(properties.edition), BPA
| order by BPA desc, Name asc
content.title: SQL Instance Details

content.json:
### Performance Monitoring
SQL instances with Azure Monitor Agent configured for performance data collection.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend monitoringEnabled = tostring(properties.monitoring.enabled)
| extend Status = iff(monitoringEnabled == 'true', 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Performance Monitoring Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| extend monitoringEnabled = tostring(properties.monitoring.enabled)
| extend Performance = iff(monitoringEnabled == 'true', 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, version = tostring(properties.version), edition = tostring(properties.edition), Performance
| order by Performance desc, Name asc
content.title: SQL Instance Details
